discussion_summary: Bootstrapped the ent (Entity Framework for Go) fork. Explored codebase structure, identified 9 major domains (core schema, code generation, templates, dialect driver interface, SQL dialect, Gremlin dialect, EntQL, privacy, CLI tools). Developer confirmed they maintain a fork and want to add a Neo4j (Cypher) dialect for use in a larger application.
recommendation: Begin the discuss-feature phase to define the Neo4j dialect requirements. Key areas to discuss: Cypher query mapping, Neo4j Go driver integration, SchemaMode capabilities, and which entity operations to support first.
